name: Kunai
description: Kunai throwing daggers offer a silent alternative to the traditional side arm. Perfect for assassins.

components.description: Kunai throwing daggers offer a silent alternative to the traditional side arm. Perfect for assassins.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.changes:
Reduced the amount of damage done from Nova's Kunai secondary. 
Kunai

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Concealed Explosives not dealing explosive damage to nearby enemies when directly hit when equipped on Spira, Kunai, Hikou, Fusilai, or Despair.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed wonky throwing animation when wall hanging and firing any ‘thrown’ weapon (Spira, Kunai, etc).

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.6.0
patchlogs.changes: Picking up disarmed thrown Secondary weapons (Kunai, Castanas, etc.) will now display the context action “Pick Up Thrown Weapon” instead of “Pick up Auto Pistol”.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Hotfix 20.5.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with the Kunai entry diorama being too zoomed in.

patchlogs.name: Banshee Prime: Hotfix 19.11.5 + 19.11.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the MK-1 Kunai and MK-1 Strun not being purchasable in the Market when completing Vor’s Prize.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.2
patchlogs.fixes: MK 1 Kunai damage has been increased in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the MK1-Kunai alerting enemies instead of being Silent.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.9.0
patchlogs.additions:
The following items will be receiving new Day of the Dead Skins:Kunai
Kunai

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Mk-1 Kunai showing a Platinum cost in the Market.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the bloom FX on Spira / Kunai weapons making it too difficult to aim through the glare.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.changes: Slightly improved hit effects to Kunai impact visual.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.13.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where Red Veil Syndicate allies in missions were using Kunai instead of Rakta Ballistica.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.7.2 + 15.7.2.1
patchlogs.changes: Adjustments made to Kunai and Despair holster to remove redundant visual attachments.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 10.3.3 + 10.3.4
patchlogs.changes: Kunai and other thrown weapons now hide on player's thighs when player is attacking with melee weapons.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.3.0: Hump Day!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed throwing animation (Kunai, Hikou) becoming jittery with fire rate increase.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 9.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect default colors appearing after choosing to reset colors for specific weapons (e.g. Kunai)

patchlogs.name: Update 9: Vor's Revenge
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed weapon attachments (Kunai/Despair holsters) that would detach from player while using a sniper rifle.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.0.7
patchlogs.changes:
Fixes for reloads repeating at low framerates (this should help with Kunai).
Fix for Kunai sound FX.
